name: Daily Briefing
description: A single-agent morning digest. Scout searches for news on configured topics and delivers a concise 5-story briefing every day. The simplest APEX template — one agent, one job.

agents.name: scout
agents.description: Daily Briefer — searches for top news on your configured topics and delivers a concise morning digest.

team_display.short_description: Morning digest of your chosen topics

review_page.context_description: Sources used to compile today's briefing

quality_dimensions.label: Relevance

quality_dimensions.label: Signal-to-Noise
quality_dimensions.description: Is the briefing focused on what matters, free of filler?

quality_dimensions.label: Factual Accuracy
quality_dimensions.description: Are the summaries accurate and free from hallucination?
